title: Pack of 6 Artificial Christmas Picks Sprays Red Berry Stems with Robin Bird Holly Leaves for Xmas Decoration Garland Wreath Making Supplies Holiday Festival Home Garden Décor
features: 🎄PACKAGE INCLUDE- You will receive 6pcs Christmas Robin Bird Picks which can be decorated to Christmas tree, wreaths, garlands & flower arrangements and more. Bring the beauty of nature into your project with these Christmas Artificial Bird Picks!

🎄DURABLE MATERIAL - This Robin Bird Christmas Ornament is made of plastic,foam and iron material,which can extend the use time and is not easily damaged.Realistic color and appearance,not easy to fade or break, good material can accompany you for long time,it can maintain a state for many years and reuse it.

🎄EXQUISITE DESIGN - Each berry stem with a artificial cute robin bird, red berries, artificial holly leaves and artificial pine cone. The natural look of the berries and leaves alongside the pinecone and the snow coverd pine branch make it look as if it has all been collected on a winter's walk through a forest. Each one is attached firmly to a flexible stem, which can highlight festival and Christmas atmosphere. Add to your Christmas tree for a pop of color and whimsy!

🎄IDEAL CHRISTMAS DECORATION - Robin Decorative Christmas Pick. A robin with cone & berries on a decorative Christmas pick. Ideal for decoration during the Christmas or other winter period. The delightful Robin Picks make the perfect Christmas decoration including for your festive wreaths,swags,dried floral arrangements table arrangements. You can add them to place settings, flowers or gifts at Christmas time. Really get into the festive mood with the addition of this stunning pick to your home. Christmas doesn't always have to be about bright colours, sometimes the best decorations are those that have an elegant beauty..

🎄WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS - These Christmas robin picks can be applied to shopping malls,offices,home living rooms,hotels and other places for Christmas decoration.You can freely DIY design with different items to decorate,the effect is realistic,as if it is a real bird. Add some elegance to your home decorations with this beautiful Christmas robin pick. Carefully designed to be able to fit perfectly into any place, it is sure to be a talking point for all of your guests. These Artificial Robins pick are sure to add a touch of fun and whimsy.
